content.text:
All changes are correctly applied. No remaining references to `Text` or `TextVariants` from `@patternfly/react-core` (the remaining `StatusText` and `StatusIconAndText` are different components from other packages).

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — `TextVariants` → `ContentVariants` (Applied ✅)
- **Import**: Renamed `TextVariants` to `ContentVariants` in the `@patternfly/react-core` import block (line 54 → 51)
- **Usage at line 291**: Changed `TextVariants.h1` → `ContentVariants.h1`
- **Usage at line 397**: Changed `TextVariants.h3` → `ContentVariants.h3`

### Fix 2 — `Text` → `Content` (Applied ✅)
- **Import**: Renamed `Text` to `Content` in the `@patternfly/react-core` import block (line 53 → 50); reordered imports alphabetically
- **Usage at line 233**: Changed `<Text>` / `</Text>` → `<Content>` / `</Content>`
- **Usage at line 291**: Changed `<Text component=...>` / `</Text>` → `<Content component=...>` / `</Content>`
- **Usage at lines 396-401**: Changed `<Text component=... className=...>` / `</Text>` → `<Content component=... className=...>` / `</Content>`

All props (`className`, `component`, `children`) are directly supported by `Content` per the migration mapping, so no prop changes were needed beyond the element rename.

chunks.response:
All changes are correctly applied. No remaining references to `Text` or `TextVariants` from `@patternfly/react-core` (the remaining `StatusText` and `StatusIconAndText` are different components from other packages).

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — `TextVariants` → `ContentVariants` (Applied ✅)
- **Import**: Renamed `TextVariants` to `ContentVariants` in the `@patternfly/react-core` import block (line 54 → 51)
- **Usage at line 291**: Changed `TextVariants.h1` → `ContentVariants.h1`
- **Usage at line 397**: Changed `TextVariants.h3` → `ContentVariants.h3`

### Fix 2 — `Text` → `Content` (Applied ✅)
- **Import**: Renamed `Text` to `Content` in the `@patternfly/react-core` import block (line 53 → 50); reordered imports alphabetically
- **Usage at line 233**: Changed `<Text>` / `</Text>` → `<Content>` / `</Content>`
- **Usage at line 291**: Changed `<Text component=...>` / `</Text>` → `<Content component=...>` / `</Content>`
- **Usage at lines 396-401**: Changed `<Text component=... className=...>` / `</Text>` → `<Content component=... className=...>` / `</Content>`

All props (`className`, `component`, `children`) are directly supported by `Content` per the migration mapping, so no prop changes were needed beyond the element rename.
